title: Enhance learningStore with auto-capture, slang detection, and suggestion pipeline
completion_summary: Enhanced learningStore: added detectSlang, suggestMemory, autoCaptureSuccessful, autoCapture, acceptAmbientEntry, listSuggestions, confirmSuggestion, rejectSuggestion. Updated store for ConversationMemory + suggestions persistence.

context_files.reason: Current learningStore structure and required enhancements for conversation learning

acceptance_criteria: detectSlang(input, mode) returns unknown words not in any language marker list
suggestMemory(input, output, mode) creates SuggestedLearning entries with confidence scores
autoCaptureSuccessful(input, output, mode) auto-stores high-confidence glossary/correction entries
listSuggestions() returns pending suggestions for user confirmation
confirmSuggestion(id) and rejectSuggestion(id) handle user feedback
Existing methods (listRelevant, addCorrection, addGlossary, addStyleRule) unchanged
